codeReview.summary: Two examples added for Lecture 1: register-usage-demo for L1-S3 (8086 CPU Architecture) and segmented-memory-demo for L1-S5 (Memory Organization). Both examples meet all structural requirements.

summary: Feature implementation passes review. Both examples (register-usage-demo, segmented-memory-demo) meet all schema requirements: non-empty code, sufficient annotations (17 and 12 respectively), at least 2 common mistakes each, provenance source files set to Lecture 1.pdf, difficulty levels set, and 8+ concepts each. Examples are properly linked in lectures.json to L1-S3 and L1-S5 respectively. Commit fd98f02 shows 275 lines added across examples.json and lectures.json. Validation报告显示956/956 assertions passed.
